question:
Directions: Study the following data carefully

and answer the questions accordingly.

Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting

around a rectangular table in such a way three

persons are sitting on the each longer side of the

table and one person is sitting on the each

shorter side of the table. All of them are facing

outside the table. All the information is not

necessarily in the same order.

D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.

A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on

the shorter side of the table. There are two

people sitting between C and G. The number of

people sitting between G and H is the same

number of people sitting between G and B. F sits

third to the left of E.

Four of the following five are alike in a certain

way and so form a group. Which one does not

belong to that group?
